revision.text:
[[de:Chonsu (Monat)]][[ru:Хонсу (месяц)]] {{Infobox hieroglyphs |NAME = Aa1:N35-M23-Z7 |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Chons|de|Chonsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chons|qid=Q1076197|1=Chonsu}}
''ḫnsw'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1*Z1 S-N35B |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''2-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Second month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|en|Season of the Harvest|qid=Q1248622|lt=Schemu|1=Season of the Harvest}} period'' }} '''Chonsu''' referred to the harvest period and the second month of the {{ill|Egyptian calendar|en|Egyptian calendar|qid=Q254101|lt=Egyptian calendar|1=Egyptian calendar}} in Ancient Egypt. From the {{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|qid=Q714601|1=Predynastic Egypt}} until the end of the {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|en|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|qid=Q191324|lt=Middle Kingdom of Egypt|1=Middle Kingdom of Egypt}}, Chonsu, originally the tenth month of the {{ill|Sothic cycle|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sothic cycle|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender|qid=Q1944246}}, represented the period from early {{ill|March|en|March|qid=Q110|lt=March|1=March}} to early {{ill|April|en|April|qid=Q118|lt=April|1=April}}. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === {{ill|Alan Gardiner|en|Alan Gardiner|qid=Q441060|lt=Alan Gardiner|1=Alan Gardiner}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|en|Richard Anthony Parker|qid=Q2148992|lt=Richard Anthony Parker|1=Richard Anthony Parker}} suggest that Chonsu changed its annual form over the course of calendar history, which is why Chonsu shifted to the ninth month by the time of the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|qid=Q180568|lt=11 Kingdom (Egypt)|1=New Kingdom of Egypt}}. In the {{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|qid=Q1279717|1=Ebers calendar}} around 1517 BC, Chonsu was positioned as the fourth {{ill|Season of the Emergence|en|Season of the Emergence|qid=Q2037143|lt=Peret|1=Season of the Emergence}} month, dating from March 16 to April 14 ({{ill|Elephantine|en|Elephantine|qid=Q284009|lt=Elephantine|1=Elephantine}}) or from March 21 to April 19 ({{ill|Memphis, Egypt|en|Memphis, Egypt|qid=Q5715|lt=Memphis (Egypt)|1=Memphis, Egypt}}). The name of the second Shemu month later changed to {{ill|Payni|de|Payni|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Payni|qid=Q643869|1=Paoni}}. === Beginning of the Flax Harvest and End of the Barley Harvest === The 11 Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|1=Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu|1=Pa-en-Chonsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pa-en-Chonsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Pa-en-Chonsu|qid=Q56414619}} is well-documented in records from the {{ill|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|en|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|qid=Q719639|lt=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|1=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt}} as the month Chonsu, marking the beginning of the {{ill|Flax harvesting in ancient Egypt|de|Flachsernte (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Flax harvesting in ancient Egypt|qid=Q1426240|1=Flax harvest (Ancient Egypt)}}, and is listed in the administrative calendar with the first “sorting works” for the then {{ill|Season of the Inundation|en|Season of the Inundation|qid=Q770568|lt=Akhet (season)|1=Season of the Inundation}} fourth month (February/early March). The end of the barley harvest was recorded in the {{ill|Sun temple of Niuserre|de|Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sun temple of Niuserre|qid=Q2009417|1=Solar Temple of Niuserre}} at the end of March.{{ill|Elmar Edel|de|Elmar Edel|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Elmar Edel|qid=Q105633|1=Elmar Edel}}: ''On the inscriptions of the seasonal reliefs in the "World Chamber" from the Sun Temple of Niuserre, Part 2''. In: '' Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, Göttingen 1964, p. 200. == See Also == * {{ill|Gezer calendar|en|Gezer calendar|qid=Q1031406|lt=Gezer Calendar|1=Gezer calendar}} == Literature == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qid=Q91239|1=Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothic and Lunar Dates: Studies on the Astronomical and Technical Chronology of Ancient Egypt.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X|qq=}} * Richard Anthony Parker: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qid=Q102228|1=Siegfried Schott}}: ''Ancient Egyptian Festival Dates.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz / Wiesbaden 1950. == References == {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} {{translated page|de|Chonsu (Monat)|version=245035729|comment=Imported full de history}} [[de:Chonsu (Monat)]] [[ru:%D0%A5%D0%BE%D0%BD%D1%81%D1%83 (%D0%BC%D0%B5%D1%81%D1%8F%D1%86)]] [[ru:Хонсу (месяц)]] {{wikidata link|Q259644}}
